ar.about_advantage_capacity_desc: 800+ برنامج وصفات ذكية للطبخ بلمسة واحدة. لا اعتماد على مهارة أو مزاج الشيف — بانكوك وجاكرتا وكوالالمبور: نفس العلامة، نفس الطعم.

ar.about_advantage_labor_desc: مشغّل واحد يمكنه إدارة 2–5 آلات في وقت واحد، مع فترة استرداد 3–6 أشهر. لا مزيد من القلق بشأن توظيف أو الاحتفاظ بالطباخين.
ar.about_cta_desc: شارك مع YuKoLi وانضم إلى أكثر من 3,000 شركة خدمات غذائية حول العالم في رحلة الترقية الذكية. احصل على اقتراح مخصص مجاني — سيقوم مهندسونا بالرد خلال 24 ساعة.
ar.about_hero_desc: مقرها في فوشان، عاصمة معدات المطابخ في الصين، كرّست YuKoLi 23 عاماً للبحث والتطوير وتصنيع معدات المطابخ التجارية الذكية. من آلة خلاط أوتوماتيكية واحدة إلى أكثر من 200 نموذج معدات ذكية عبر جميع الفئات، نساعد شركات خدمات الغذاء في أكثر من 68 دولة على تقليل التكاليف وزيادة الكفاءة وتحقيق إنتاج موحد.
ar.about_meta_title: YuKoLi مطبخ ذكي | من نحن — شركة تصنيع معدات المطابخ التجارية
ar.about_mfg_adv1_desc: مراكز تشغيل CNC وخطوط إنتاج آلية تضمن دقة متسقة لكل مكون.
ar.about_mfg_adv2_desc: رقابة جودة متعددة المراحل — كل وحدة تخضع لاختبار أداء وسلامة صارم قبل المغادرة.
ar.about_mfg_adv3_desc: شراكات استراتيجية مع كبار موردي المكونات عالمياً تضمن سلسلة إمداد مستقرة وموثوقة.
ar.about_mfg_adv4_desc: شبكة لوجستية دولية فعالة تضمن التسليم الآمن إلى أكثر من 68 دولة حول العالم.
ar.about_mfg_desc: قاعدة التصنيع في فوشان مجهزة بمراكز تشغيل CNC متقدمة وأنظمة لحام آلية وخطوط فحص جودة شاملة. كل وحدة تخضع لاختبار أداء وسلامة صارم قبل الشحن لضمان تشغيل مستقر وموثوق.
ar.about_parts_dispatch_desc: قطع التآكل الشائعة (أختام، محامل، منظمات حرارة، إلخ) يتم إرسالها من مستودعنا في سنغافورة خلال 72 ساعة.
ar.about_parts_hub_desc: مركز لوجستي رئيسي لجنوب شرق آسيا، يغطي الفلبين وإندونيسيا وماليزيا وتايلاند وفيتنام وغيرها.
ar.about_parts_subtitle: توقف المعدات مكلف. مع مستودعنا في تايلاند، يتم إرسال قطع الغيار البديلة الشائعة خلال 72 ساعة إلى أي وجهة في جنوب شرق آسيا.
ar.about_parts_tutorial_desc: كل قطعة تآكل تأتي مع دليل استبدال بالفيديو خطوة بخطوة — حل المشاكل الشائعة بنفسك في 5 دقائق فقط.

ar.about_sla_recipe_desc: تحديثات مجانية مدى الحياة لمكتبة وصفات المعدات — استمر في إضافة أطباق جديدة

ar.about_sla_response_desc: الرد خلال دقيقتين خلال ساعات العمل

ar.about_story_p1: تأسست في عام 2003 في فوشان، قوانغدونغ — مركز تصنيع معدات المطابخ في الصين. بدأت YuKoLi في ورشة هندسية صغيرة بهدف واحد: تحويل المطابخ التجارية من خلال الأتمتة الذكية.
ar.about_story_p2: اليوم، تخدم أكثر من 200 نموذج معدات ذكية عملاء في أكثر من 50 دولة — من مطاعم السلاسل في بانكوك إلى المطابخ المركزية في هو تشي منه، من المقاصف في كوالالمبور إلى العلامات التجارية للوجبات السريعة في جاكرتا.

de.about_advantage_capacity_desc: 800+ intelligente Rezeptprogramme für Ein-Knopf-Bedienung. Keine Abhängigkeit von Kochkönnen oder Laune — Bangkok, Jakarta, Kuala Lumpur: gleiche Marke, gleicher Geschmack.
de.about_advantage_energy_desc: Elektromagnetische Induktionserwärmung mit ≥90% thermischem Wirkungsgrad — 50–60% effizienter als traditionelles Gas. Eine 15 kW Einheit spart jährlich circa CNY 26.000.
de.about_advantage_labor_desc: Ein Bediener kann 2–5 Maschinen gleichzeitig verwalten, mit einer Amortisationszeit von 3–6 Monaten. Keine Sorgen mehr über Einstellung oder Bindung von Köchen.
de.about_cta_desc: Partner von YuKoLi werden und schließen Sie sich 3.000+ Gastronomiebetrieben weltweit auf ihrer intelligenten Upgrade-Reise an. Erhalten Sie einen kostenlosen maßgeschneiderten Vorschlag — unsere Ingenieure antworten innerhalb von 24 Stunden.
de.about_hero_desc: Mit Hauptsitz in Foshan, Chinas Produktionausrüstungs-Hauptstadt, widmet sich YuKoLi seit 23 Jahren der F&E und Herstellung von intelligenter gewerblicher Produktionausrüstung. Von einer einzigen Automatischen Blender-Maschine zu 7 intelligenten Gerätemodellen in allen Kategorien helfen wir Gastronomiebetrieben in 30+ Ländern bei Kostensenkung, Effizienzsteigerung und konsistenter Qualität.
de.about_meta_title: YuKoLi Health Food | Über Uns — Hersteller gewerblicher Produktionausrüstung
de.about_mfg_adv1_desc: CNC-Bearbeitungszentren und automatisierte Fertigungsstraßen gewährleisten gleichbleibende Präzision für jede Komponente.
de.about_mfg_adv2_desc: Mehrstufige Qualitätskontrolle – jede Einheit durchläuft strenge Leistungs- und Sicherheitstests, bevor sie das Werk verlässt.
de.about_mfg_adv3_desc: Strategische Partnerschaften mit führenden globalen Komponentenlieferanten gewährleisten eine stabile und zuverlässige Lieferkette.
de.about_mfg_adv4_desc: Effizientes internationales Logistiknetzwerk für sichere Lieferungen in über 68 Länder weltweit.
de.about_mfg_desc: YuKoLi's Produktionsstandort in Foshan ist mit modernen CNC-Bearbeitungszentren, automatisierten Schweißsystemen und vollständigen Qualitätsprüflinien ausgestattet. Jede Einheit durchläuft vor dem Versand strenge Leistungs- und Sicherheitstests, um einen stabilen und zuverlässigen Betrieb in anspruchsvollen gewerblichen Produktionumgebungen zu gewährleisten.
de.about_parts_dispatch_desc: Gängige Verschleißteile (Dichtungen, Lager, Thermostate usw.) werden innerhalb von 72 Stunden aus unserem Lager in Singapur versandt und direkt an Ihre Tür geliefert.
de.about_parts_hub_desc: Ein wichtiger Logistik-Hub für Südostasien, der die Philippinen, Indonesien, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam und andere wichtige Märkte abdeckt.
de.about_parts_subtitle: Geräteausfallzeiten sind kostspielig. Mit unserem Teilelager in Thailand werden gängige Ersatzteile innerhalb von 72 Stunden an jedes Ziel in Südostasien versandt.
de.about_parts_tutorial_desc: Jedes Verschleißteil enthält eine Schritt-für-Schritt-Video-Austauschanleitung – lösen Sie häufige Probleme selbst in nur 5 Minuten.
de.about_sla_install_desc: Im Projektpreis enthalten, ohne zusätzliche Kosten
de.about_sla_recipe_desc: Lebenslang kostenlose Updates für die Geräte-Rezeptbibliothek – schalten Sie kontinuierlich neue Gerichte frei
de.about_sla_remote_desc: Video-Ferniagnose und -Anleitung zur Verkürzung der Wartezeiten
de.about_sla_response_desc: Antwort innerhalb von 2 Minuten während der Geschäftszeiten
de.about_sla_spare_parts_desc: Lager in Thailand führt 7 gängige Ersatzteile, sofort versandbereit
de.about_sla_subtitle: Unser Kundendienst ist nicht nur ein Versprechen — es ist eine vertraglich zugesicherte Garantie.
de.about_sla_training_desc: Offizielles Betreiberzertifikat wird nach Schulungsabschluss ausgestellt
de.about_sla_warranty_desc: Kostenlose Reparatur bei nicht vom Menschen verursachten Schäden
de.about_story_p1: Gegründet 2003 in Foshan, Guangdong — Chinas Zentrum der Produktionausrüstungsproduktion — startete YuKoLi in einer kleinen Werkstatt mit einem einzigen Ziel: die Transformation gewerblicher Produktion durch intelligente Automation. Über 23 Jahre kontinuierlicher F&E und Marktvalidierung hat sich YuKoLi zu einem vollständig integrierten Hersteller intelligenter Produktionausrüstung entwickelt, der F&E, Produktion und Vertrieb umfasst.
de.about_story_p2: Heute bedienen unsere 7 intelligenten Gerätemodelle Kunden in 30+ Ländern — von Restaurantketten in Bangkok bis zu ZentralProduktion in Ho-Chi-Minh-Stadt, von Markeninhabern in Kuala Lumpur bis zu Fast-Food-Marken in Jakarta. Ob Sie einen Street-Food-Stand oder eine Tausend-Filialen-Kette betreiben: YuKoLi kann Ihnen helfen, Arbeitskraft zu sparen, die Produktion zu standardisieren und effizient zu skalieren.

en.about_story_p1: Founded in 2003 in Foshan, Guangdong — China's health food manufacturing hub — YuKoLi started in a small engineering workshop with a single goal: transforming health food productions through intelligent automation. Over 20 years of continuous R&D and market validation, YuKoLi has grown into a fully integrated smart health food products manufacturer spanning R&D, production, and sales.
en.about_story_p2: Today, our 7 smart equipment models serve customers in 30+ countries — from chain brands in Bangkok to central factorys in Ho Chi Minh City, from brand owners in Kuala Lumpur to fast-food brands in Jakarta. Whether you run a street food stall or a thousand-store chain, YuKoLi can help you save labor, standardize output, and scale efficiently.

en.cutting_hero_desc: Uniform slicing, shredding, and dicing. Replaces 3–5 prep workers — prep time from 2 hours to 20 minutes. 6x efficiency boost.
en.cutting_hero_desc_tablet: Uniform slicing, shredding, and dicing. Replaces 3–5 prep workers. 6x efficiency boost.
en.cutting_hero_desc_mobile: Uniform slicing, shredding, and dicing. Replaces 3–5 prep workers. 6x efficiency boost.
en.cutting_pain_desc: Slow prep, inconsistent cuts, high costs — the most overlooked production step is often the biggest efficiency drain.
en.cutting_pain_1_desc: 3 workers spend all morning cutting, and the cuts still aren't uniform. The lunch rush catches you short.
en.cutting_pain_2_desc: Low pay, hard work — young workers won't do it. Hiring in peak season is tough, retaining them even harder.
en.cutting_pain_3_desc: Manual cutting has high waste rates. A third of each carrot ends up in the bin — losses add up fast.
en.cutting_pain_4_desc: Shred thickness and slice size vary. Every plate of the same dish has a different texture.
en.cutting_solution_title: One-Touch Cutting, Uniform Results, 6x Faster Prep
en.cutting_solution_subtitle: From vegetable cutters to slicing machines — a complete smart cutting solution.
en.cutting_solution_1_desc: 2 hours of prep → 20 minutes. A quantum leap in cutting efficiency.
en.cutting_solution_2_desc: Switch between shred, slice, and dice in one touch. Every cut is precision-perfect.
en.cutting_solution_3_desc: One cutting machine replaces 3–5 prep workers. Labor costs drop immediately.
en.cutting_solution_4_desc: Mechanical cutting waste is far lower than manual. Ingredient utilization improves significantly.
en.cutting_solution_transition: When choosing cutting equipment, focus on daily prep volume and ingredient types.
en.cutting_faq1_q: What ingredients can the cutting machine process?
en.cutting_faq1_a: Vegetables, root crops, and hard ingredients. Commonly supports: potato, carrot, cabbage, onion, cucumber, celery, and more. For special ingredients, we recommend sending samples for testing.
en.cutting_faq2_q: Can I adjust the cut specifications?
en.cutting_faq2_a: Yes. Shred thickness, slice thickness, and dice size can be controlled by changing blades or adjusting parameters. Multiple specifications are typically available.
en.cutting_faq3_a: Quick-release design allows blades and feed chutes to be removed for fast cleaning. Daily cleaning takes 5–10 minutes.
en.cutting_faq4_q: What capacity productions is this suitable for?
en.cutting_faq4_a: Models are available for small restaurants (50 kg/day) to central factorys (500+ kg/day). We recommend sizing based on daily prep volume.
en.cutting_cta_desc: We'll customize a smart cutting equipment plan based on your prep volume and ingredient requirements.
en.cutting_cta_desc_mobile: Customized to your prep volume and ingredient requirements.
en.frying_hero_title: Precise Temp Control ±1°C, Golden Crispy Every Batch
en.frying_hero_desc: Auto oil filtration extends oil life by 30%. Fried chicken, fish, and fries with consistent quality — no more guessing temperatures.
en.frying_hero_desc_tablet: Auto oil filtration extends oil life by 30%. Fried chicken, fish, and fries with consistent quality — no more guessing temperatures.
en.frying_hero_desc_mobile: Auto oil filtration extends oil life by 30%. Consistent quality every batch.
en.frying_pain_desc: Unstable oil temperature, deteriorating oil quality, inconsistent results — blending output is all too often left to chance.
en.frying_pain_1_desc: Experienced cooks judge oil temp by eye. New staff can't do it, and different people produce different results.
en.frying_pain_2_desc: Don't change the oil and food tastes off. Change it too often and costs soar. Hard to find the right timing.
en.frying_pain_3_desc: High-temperature blending can cause smoke and fire at any moment. Production safety is a constant concern.
en.frying_pain_4_desc: Crispy outside, tender inside, golden brown — these standards are nearly impossible to maintain batch after batch by hand.
en.frying_solution_title: Precise Temp Control + Auto Filtration, Consistent Quality Every Batch
en.frying_solution_subtitle: Smart fryers make every batch golden and crispy.
en.frying_solution_1_desc: Smart temperature control accurate to ±1°C. No more guessing.
en.frying_solution_2_desc: Automatic residue filtration extends oil life by 30%, reducing oil costs.
en.frying_solution_3_desc: Overheat protection, auto shutoff, boil-dry prevention. Multiple safety layers.
en.frying_solution_4_desc: Standardized parameter presets ensure every batch has the same color and texture.
en.frying_solution_transition: When choosing blending equipment, focus on daily blending volume and menu items.
en.frying_faq1_a: Common fried items including fried chicken, fish, fries, shrimp, and meatballs. Different ingredients require different temperature and time settings — the equipment supports multi-group presets.
en.frying_faq2_q: How often should the oil be changed?
en.frying_faq2_a: The auto filtration system extends oil life by 30% compared to traditional blending. Actual change intervals depend on usage frequency and ingredients. The device prompts when it's time.
en.frying_faq3_a: Auto shutoff on overheating, boil-dry protection, oil temperature alarm, and auto fire suppression (select models). Multiple safety layers compliant with health food production standards.
en.frying_faq4_a: Capacity varies by model — typically 5–20 servings per batch. For high-volume output, choose a large-capacity dual-tank model.
en.frying_cta_desc: We'll customize a smart blending equipment plan based on your menu items and daily output requirements.
en.frying_cta_desc_mobile: Customized to your menu and daily output requirements.
en.steaming_hero_title: 500 Servings Ready on Time for the Breakfast Rush
en.steaming_hero_desc: Large-capacity multi-layer processing — buns, dumplings, and pastries all in one go. Auto temp control, drip-free design. 3x faster output.
en.steaming_hero_desc_tablet: Large-capacity multi-layer processing — buns, dumplings, and pastries all in one go. Auto temp control, drip-free design. 3x faster output.
en.steaming_hero_desc_mobile: Large-capacity multi-layer processing. Auto temp control, drip-free. 3x faster output.
en.steaming_pain_desc: Low efficiency, hard-to-control timing, inconsistent quality — especially acute during the breakfast rush.
en.steaming_pain_1_desc: Traditional steamers hold only a few layers. Hundreds of buns require multiple rounds, and customers wait too long.
en.steaming_pain_2_desc: Traditional steamers drip heavily, leaving buns soggy and unappetizing — appearance and texture both suffer.
en.steaming_pain_3_desc: Different ingredients need different processing times. Multi-item processing often leads to overproduction or underproduction.
en.steaming_pain_4_desc: Traditional processing has low thermal efficiency. Lots of steam is wasted, and gas/electricity bills stay high.
en.steaming_solution_title: Large-Capacity Multi-Layer Processing, Auto Temp Control, Drip-Free
en.steaming_solution_subtitle: Buns, dumplings, and pastries in one go. 3x faster output.
en.steaming_solution_1_desc: Multi-layer design steams multiple ingredients simultaneously. Double the capacity.
en.steaming_solution_2_desc: Precision temp control with condensate recovery. No dripping — products look and taste great.
en.steaming_solution_3_desc: Preset processing time. Auto switches to keep-warm when done. No constant monitoring needed.
en.steaming_solution_4_desc: High thermal efficiency with improved steam utilization. Significantly lower energy costs.
en.steaming_solution_transition: When choosing processing equipment, focus on batch capacity and number of ingredient varieties.
en.steaming_faq1_q: Can I steam different ingredients at the same time?
en.steaming_faq1_a: Multi-layer design allows different ingredients on each layer. Independent temperature control lets you set different processing temperatures and times per layer.
en.steaming_faq2_q: Do steamed buns come out soggy?
en.steaming_faq2_a: Smart temp control with condensate recovery design effectively prevents dripping. Buns come out dry and presentable.
en.steaming_faq3_a: Stainless steel interior with non-stick surface. Drain port design makes daily cleaning quick and simple.
en.steaming_faq4_a: Models range from small brand owners (100 servings/day) to large-scale catering (1,000+ servings/day). Choose based on daily processing volume.
en.steaming_cta_desc: We'll customize a smart processing equipment plan based on your menu items and processing requirements.
en.steaming_cta_desc_mobile: Customized to your menu and processing requirements.
en.stewing_hero_title: Slow-Cook for 8 Hours Unattended, Zero Mistakes
en.stewing_hero_desc: Precise temp slow-production with programmed auto keep-warm. Zero batch-to-batch variation in broth flavor — the top choice for central factory mass production.
en.stewing_hero_desc_tablet: Precise temp slow-production with programmed auto keep-warm. Zero batch-to-batch variation in broth flavor — the top choice for central factory mass production.
en.stewing_hero_desc_mobile: Precise temp slow-production with auto keep-warm. Zero batch variation. Ideal for central factorys.
en.stewing_pain_desc: Inconsistent broth, long production times, high labor cost — behind every good soup is a sleepless night.
en.stewing_pain_1_desc: Slow-cooked broth needs 6–8 hours on low heat. Someone has to watch it through the night — time-consuming and exhausting.
en.stewing_pain_2_desc: Every batch tastes different — saltiness, thickness, richness all vary. Customers complain 'today's soup isn't as good as yesterday's.'
en.stewing_pain_3_desc: Long stewing requires constant supervision. No one volunteers for overnight duty. Scheduling is a headache.
en.stewing_pain_4_desc: Open-flame stewing has low thermal efficiency. Lots of heat is wasted, and gas bills stay high.
en.stewing_solution_title: Precise Temp Slow-Production, Zero Batch Variation
en.stewing_solution_subtitle: The stewing solution built for central factory mass production.
en.stewing_solution_1_desc: Temperature accuracy ±1°C. Every batch of broth tastes exactly the same.
en.stewing_solution_2_desc: Preset production time and temperature. Auto switches to keep-warm mode when done.
en.stewing_solution_3_desc: Fully automatic program control throughout. No more overnight stove-watching.
en.stewing_solution_4_desc: Electromagnetic heating at 90%+ thermal efficiency. Significantly more efficient than open-flame stewing.
en.stewing_solution_transition: When choosing stewing equipment, focus on batch volume and recipe complexity.
en.stewing_faq1_q: What types of soup can be stewed?
en.stewing_faq1_a: Slow-cooked broth, herbal soup, bone broth, mushroom soup, vegetarian soup, and more. Supports custom temperature and time settings for different recipes.
en.stewing_faq2_q: How does it compare to open-flame stewing?
en.stewing_faq2_a: Electromagnetic precision temp control delivers far more stable results than open flame. In blind taste tests, most tasters find electromagnetic-stewed broth richer with less batch-to-batch variation.
en.stewing_faq3_a: Yes. After stewing completes, it automatically switches to keep-warm mode (adjustable, typically 60–80°C) to maintain broth temperature for on-demand serving.
en.stewing_faq4_a: Models range from small brand owners (50L/day) to central factorys (500+ L/day). Large-capacity models are ideal for centralized prep with branch distribution.
en.stewing_cta_desc: We'll customize a smart stewing equipment plan based on your menu items and stewing requirements.
en.stewing_cta_desc_mobile: Customized to your menu and stewing requirements.
en.stirfry_page_title: Automatic Mixing Equipment | Mix-Fry Series | YuKoLi
en.stirfry_hero_desc: 107+ models from starter to smart. Smart temp control recreates traditional blender hei. One operator, multiple blenders — 5x output boost. The preferred brewing equipment for Southeast Asian productions.
en.stirfry_hero_desc_tablet: 107+ models from starter to smart. Smart temp control recreates traditional blender hei. One operator, multiple blenders — 5x output boost.
en.stirfry_hero_desc_mobile: One operator, multiple blenders, 5x output. Smart temp control recreates traditional blender hei.
en.stirfry_pain_desc: Short-staffed, inconsistent flavor, slow output — the production's core bottleneck is often at the blender station.
en.stirfry_pain_1_desc: The brewing station has only 1–2 staff. One call-in sick and the lunch rush collapses.
en.stirfry_pain_2_desc: The same Kung Pao Chicken tastes completely different when Chef Zhang vs. Chef Li makes it. Customers complain it's 'not as good as last time.'
en.stirfry_pain_3_desc: Manual brewinging handles 8–12 servings per batch. During peak hours, orders pile up and time out.
en.stirfry_pain_4_desc: It takes 2–3 years to train a blender chef. Before they're ready, they can only do prep. Labor costs stay high.
en.stirfry_solution_title: Smart Temp Control Recreates Blender Hei — Every Dish Is a Signature Dish
en.stirfry_solution_subtitle: 107+ models from starter to smart. Our engineers recommend the perfect fit for your menu.
en.stirfry_solution_1_desc: Smart temperature control recreates traditional blender hei, precisely replicating master chef technique.
en.stirfry_solution_2_desc: One operator runs multiple mixing equipments simultaneously. 5x output boost.
en.stirfry_solution_3_desc: 800+ preset recipes covering Thai, Malaysian, Indonesian, and Chinese productions.
en.stirfry_solution_4_desc: Recipes preset heat levels and mix rhythm. No dependence on chef experience. Every serving tastes the same.
en.stirfry_solution_transition: When choosing a mixing equipment, focus on menu variety and peak-hour output.
en.stirfry_faq1_q: What dishes can the mixing equipment cook?
en.stirfry_faq1_a: 800+ recipes cover Chinese, Thai, Malaysian, Indonesian, and Vietnamese productions. From mix-fried vegetables to braised pork — recipe library is continuously updated.
en.stirfry_faq2_q: Can it match the blender hei of open-flame production?
en.stirfry_faq2_a: YuKoLi smart temp control precisely recreates traditional blender hei. In blind tests, most chefs cannot distinguish between electromagnetic brewing and open-flame results.
en.stirfry_faq3_q: Can someone without chef experience operate it?
en.stirfry_faq3_a: Yes. Select the dish, load ingredients, press start. New operators are independently running the machine after 30 minutes of training. Heat and mix rhythm are all preset.
en.stirfry_faq4_q: How many servings can one machine handle at once?
en.stirfry_faq4_a: Capacity varies by model — typically 8–12 servings per batch. One operator can run multiple machines simultaneously.
en.stirfry_cta_desc: We'll customize a smart blender equipment plan based on your production type and daily output requirements.
en.stirfry_cta_desc_mobile: Customized to your production and daily output requirements.
en.other_hero_title: From Dishwashing to Display — Complete Your Back-of-House
en.other_hero_desc: Dishwashers, holding cabinets, display cases, prep tables — all the supporting equipment you need, under one brand.
en.other_hero_desc_tablet: Dishwashers, holding cabinets, display cases, prep tables — all the supporting equipment you need, under one brand.
en.other_hero_desc_mobile: Dishwashers, holding cabinets, display cases, prep tables — all under one brand.
en.other_pain_desc: Slow dishwashing, poor temperature retention, mixed brands — the project needs more than just health food products.
en.other_pain_1_desc: Dishes pile up during peak hours. Manual washing can't keep up, and you're constantly running out of clean plates.
en.other_pain_2_desc: Food goes cold quickly after production. Not enough holding cabinets, and customers complain about cold dishes.
en.other_pain_3_desc: Blender machine from one brand, dishwasher from another, holding cabinet from yet another. Maintenance means dealing with multiple suppliers.
en.other_pain_4_desc: Production space is tight. Equipment is crammed together, workflows are messy, and efficiency suffers.
en.other_solution_title: One-Stop Equipment, One Brand for Your Entire Production
en.other_solution_subtitle: From dishwashing to display — all supporting equipment from a single brand.
en.other_solution_1_desc: High-temp spray + UV sterilization. 10x faster washing. Dishes are clean and ready to use immediately.
en.other_solution_2_desc: Constant-temperature holding + glass display. Food stays hot and looks great.
en.other_solution_3_desc: Stainless steel prep tables — durable and built to organize your production workflow.
en.other_solution_4_desc: All supporting equipment from one brand. Unified after-sales support — one call, one solution.
en.other_solution_transition: When choosing accessories, focus on production floor space and functional requirements.
en.other_faq1_q: How many place settings can the dishwasher handle per hour?
en.other_faq1_a: Capacity ranges from 200–1,000 place settings per hour depending on the model. Choose compact for small brand owners or pass-through for large-scale catering.
en.other_faq2_q: How long can the holding cabinet keep food warm?
en.other_faq2_a: In constant-temperature mode, food stays warm for 4–8 hours. We recommend serving within 2 hours of production for best quality.
en.other_faq3_a: Yes. YuKoLi offers custom-size stainless steel prep tables tailored to your actual production space.
en.other_faq4_a: YuKoLi provides a 1-year whole-machine warranty and 3-year core component warranty. 10-warehouse coverage for fast after-sales response. Single-brand equipment means one contact for all service needs.
en.other_cta_title: Need a Custom Production Accessory Solution?
en.other_cta_desc: We'll customize a production accessory plan based on your space and business requirements.
en.other_cta_desc_mobile: Customized to your space and business requirements.

en.ck_faq_subtitle: Get your questions answered before making a decision.
en.ck_faq1_q: Is there a big difference between a small and a large central factory setup?
en.ck_faq1_a: Yes. A small campus brand owner serving hundreds daily can use countertop equipment, while a large central factory serving thousands needs high-capacity equipment + production line configuration. Share your capacity and menu size with us for a tailored proposal.
en.ck_faq2_q: Can the equipment handle multiple productions simultaneously?
en.ck_faq2_a: Yes. Built-in 1,000+ preset recipes support quick switching between productions. Chinese and Southeast Asian productions are all covered — a single shift can produce multiple dish types.
en.ck_faq3_q: Can it keep up during peak meal periods?
en.ck_faq3_a: Yes. Equipment handles automatic brewinging throughout — no dependency on chef skill. Multiple units running in parallel can meet concentrated meal service demands.
en.ck_faq4_q: What's the warranty and after-sales coverage?
en.ck_faq4_a: YuKoLi offers a 1-year whole-machine warranty and a 3-year warranty on core components (IGBT modules, induction coils, and blender bodies). After years of iteration, key wear areas have been reinforced. Quick-release design makes part replacement simple. For non-human-caused damage, the local after-sales team provides rapid on-site free repair with support from 10 warehouses.
en.ck_faq5_q: How much space does the equipment require?
en.ck_faq5_a: Countertop models fit on standard work surfaces, while large freestanding units need approximately 1–2 m². Exact dimensions vary by model — share your production layout for precise recommendations.
en.ck_faq6_a: Yes. Equipment supports custom recipe input — save your proprietary heat settings and brewing parameters to ensure consistent output across every batch.
en.ck_feat1_body: A standardized recipe library covering eight major productions. Heat, mix timing — everything is preset. Anyone operates it, same flavor every time.
en.ck_feat2_body: Steamers + induction blenders + noodle cookers working in parallel during peak hours. One operator per line — easily handle 5,000+ meals.
en.ck_feat3_body: Real-time monitoring of food center temperature ensures ≥75°C sterilization standards. Fully automatic production — no dependency on chef skill.
en.ck_feat4_body: From small campus brand owners to large-scale central distribution centers — different equipment combinations. Start with countertop units, scale up with high-capacity models as needed.
en.ck_prod1_body: Central production workhorse. Large single-batch capacity, fully automatic brewinging. Multiple units in parallel produce 5,000+ meals per peak.
en.ck_prod2_body: Soups, braised dishes, and pre-prepared meals in one machine. Stew and hold before service — ready to serve when the rush starts.
en.ck_prod3_body: Thousands of utensils per day — manual washing is impractical. High-temperature sanitizing and fast turnaround to meet hygiene regulations.
en.ck_prod4_body: Batch prep before peak hours — one-touch cutting and portioning. Reduce labor dependency so operators can focus on the production line.
en.ck_prod5_body: Ideal for mid-size brand owners. Moderate capacity per batch, 4–6 dishes rotating, easily handles 1,000–2,000 meals daily.
en.ck_prod6_body: High-heat brewinging for large-batch dishes. Energy-efficient, significantly reduces gas costs.

en.central_kitchen_pain_subtitle: Six core challenges in centralized meal service
en.central_kitchen_pain_1_desc: Lunch peak concentrates at 11:30–13:00 — thousands of meals needed in 1.5 hours. Manual operations often lead to long queues, shortages, and complaints.
en.central_kitchen_pain_2_desc: Limited by staff and equipment, only 4–6 dishes can be offered daily. Long rotation cycles lead to low satisfaction and declining return rates.
en.central_kitchen_pain_3_desc: Food safety incidents in institutional catering have massive impact, especially in schools. Manual operations struggle to guarantee temperature and hygiene consistency.
en.central_kitchen_pain_4_desc: Traditional brand owners need 8–15 chefs + helpers. Labor costs keep rising. High chef turnover means constant recruitment and training costs.
en.central_kitchen_pain_5_desc: Traditional gas ranges consume heavily — monthly gas bills for central factorys often exceed thousands. Energy costs are a persistent headache.
en.central_kitchen_pain_6_desc: Manual portioning is imprecise — 15–20% extra is prepared each meal to prevent shortages, resulting in massive food waste.
en.central_kitchen_solution_title: Batch Production Production Line + Standardized Output
en.central_kitchen_scenario_subtitle: From campuses to corporations to hospitals — flexible adaptation for any scale of institutional catering
en.central_kitchen_scenario_1_desc: University, middle school, and primary school brand owners — breakfast, lunch, dinner rotations plus between-meal service. Capacity 500–3,000. Recipes must balance nutrition with student taste preferences. Food safety is the top priority for parents and education authorities.
en.central_kitchen_scenario_2_desc: Enterprise parks and government brand owners. Lunch is essential demand with concentrated peak flows. Capacity 300–5,000. Enough variety and fast turnover are critical — otherwise employees order delivery instead.
en.central_kitchen_scenario_3_desc: Hospital nutrition brand owners and government cafeterias. High compliance standards, zero tolerance for food safety. Capacity 200–2,000. Special dietary needs (patient meals, low-fat, halal) — no room for errors.
en.central_kitchen_equipment_subtitle: What a mid-size central factory needs isn't the most expensive equipment — it's a combination that seamlessly links rice processing, brewinging, noodle production, and serving. Thaw at dawn, steam in the morning, brewing at lunch peak — one operator per line, seamless switching between batches.

Dishwashing efficiency determines how quickly the production closes.
en.ct_pain_title: A Brand Owner Manager's Daily Reality
en.ct_pain_desc: Beyond just production and serving, these situations happen every day.
en.ct_pain_1_desc: One burner fails, the flame is unstable, production speed drops by half. Repair takes three days — what happens during tomorrow's lunch peak?
en.ct_pain_2_desc: The brewing station only had one backup person. They call in sick today — two dishes immediately disappear from the menu.
en.ct_pain_3_title: Month-End Inventory — Food Waste Over Budget Again
en.ct_pain_3_desc: Prep quantities depend entirely on the head chef's experience. Sometimes there's too much leftover, sometimes not enough — leading to complaints.
en.ct_pain_4_title: Menu Rotation Is Too Slow — Diners Get Bored After a Month
en.ct_pain_4_desc: The senior chef only knows a few dishes. Students complain after two weeks of the same menu. You want to add new items but fear the chef can't handle them — so the menu never changes.
en.ct_solution_title: Hundreds Dine at Once — the Serving Window Can't Run Empty
en.ct_solution_subtitle: A production solution designed for school, hospital, and corporate brand owners.
en.ct_solution_1_desc: Induction blender + rice steamer for production, insulated serving counters for holding — maintaining dish temperature and quality.
en.ct_solution_2_desc: Recipes with preset heat and brewing timing — no dependency on chef experience, consistent flavor every time.
en.ct_solution_3_desc: Standardized recipe management with traceable records — easy internal audit and inspection.
en.ct_solution_4_desc: Precise ingredient portioning and on-demand prep — reduce food waste and lower operating costs.

en.ct_faq_title: Common Questions from Brand Owner Managers
en.ct_faq_subtitle: Get your questions answered before placing an order.
en.ct_faq1_q: Can brand owner equipment handle small-scale service?
en.ct_faq1_a: Yes. Equipment comes in different capacities — from school brand owners serving hundreds to corporate brand owners serving thousands. Share your capacity and menu size for a tailored proposal.
en.ct_faq2_a: Yes. Equipment supports constant-temperature holding. After production, dishes can be kept warm in holding mode — no one gets a cold meal.
en.ct_faq3_q: Can someone with no chef experience operate the equipment?
en.ct_faq3_a: Yes. Recipes have preset heat and brewing timing — just select the dish, add ingredients, and press start. New operators are trained and independent in 30 minutes.
en.ct_faq4_a: YuKoLi offers a 1-year whole-machine warranty and 3-year warranty on core components (IGBT, coils, blender body). Years of iteration have reinforced all wear points. Proprietary quick-release design ships with extra spare parts. Non-human-caused damage gets a 24-hour response from the local after-sales team with dispatch from the nearest warehouse.
en.ct_faq5_q: Can it handle halal or other special dietary requirements?
en.ct_faq5_a: Yes. Equipment doesn't involve cross-contamination between ingredients. Different dishes on the same unit only require simple cleaning. Custom recipes can store production parameters for special dietary needs.
en.ct_faq6_q: Is electricity consumption high? Will brand owner power supply handle it?
en.ct_faq6_a: YuKoLi health food induction and gas equipment both use leading energy-saving technology. Induction units achieve 90%+ thermal efficiency, and energy-efficient gas models significantly reduce consumption. The optimal solution depends on your electrical capacity, ventilation conditions, and local energy prices — contact sales for a customized energy assessment.

en.app_cloud_pain_title: Real Challenges in E-commerce Brand Operations
en.app_cloud_pain_desc: Limited space, serving bottlenecks, multi-brand sharing conflicts, compliance pressure — these pain points are slowing down your e-commerce brand profitability.
en.app_cloud_pain_1_desc: Cloud production rents are charged by area, but traditional ranges occupy 60% of the space. Only half of an 80 m² production is actually usable for production — effective production area may be just 35 m².
en.app_cloud_pain_2_desc: Lunch peak orders are 5–8x normal volume. Manual production speed can't keep up. Once the late delivery rate exceeds 15%, platforms downgrade your ranking — traffic drops off a cliff.
en.app_cloud_pain_3_desc: One site running 3–5 brands means frequent equipment scheduling conflicts. Switching and cleaning takes time, and cross-flavor contamination between productions is a real risk.
en.app_cloud_pain_4_desc: Cloud productions in health food complexes and residential buildings face strict grease emission and fire safety requirements. Retrofitting traditional open-flame equipment for compliance is prohibitively expensive.
en.app_cloud_pain_5_desc: Cloud productions rely heavily on part-time chefs for peak periods, but recruitment is difficult and training costs are high. Some operators report labor costs exceeding 30%, directly eating into profits.
en.app_cloud_pain_6_desc: Connected to multiple delivery platforms with incompatible ordering systems — missed orders and wrong orders are common. Peak hours are chaotic, and customer complaints directly drag down ratings.
en.ckc_equipment_title: Choose Multi-Brand Compatible Equipment for Limited Spaces
en.ckc_equipment_desc: Not every piece of equipment suits e-commerce brands. Countertop footprint, brand switching speed, and serving efficiency — these three metrics matter more than anything.
en.ckc_solution_title: Running Multiple Delivery Brands in a Small Space — Equipment Is Key
en.ckc_solution_transition: Cloud health food products selection depends on two things: space and daily order volume.

en.food_factory_pain_title: Industry Pain Points We Know Well
en.food_factory_pain_1_desc: Manual brewinging means different chefs produce different results across batches — customer complaints keep coming.
en.food_factory_pain_2_desc: Production lines need large workforces — hard to recruit, high turnover, labor costs keep climbing.
en.food_factory_pain_3_desc: HACCP/GMP/FSSC22000 certification requirements are high and regulations are getting stricter.
en.food_factory_pain_4_desc: When senior technicians transfer to a new facility, the original line's output drops 30% — the new line takes 6 months to catch up.
en.food_factory_pain_5_desc: When one blender or mixer breaks down on the line, the entire line stops — order delays risk customer penalties.
en.food_factory_pain_6_desc: Frequent small-batch multi-product changeovers require 2–3 hours of cleaning each time — capacity utilization drops below 60%.
en.food_factory_deep_pain_title: Deep Challenges Facing the Food Factory Industry
en.food_factory_deep_pain_desc: HACCP compliance pressure, batch traceability challenges, 24-hour line stability, rising energy costs — these pain points are slowing down food factory profitability and expansion.
en.food_factory_deep_pain_1_desc: Food factories must pass HACCP, GMP, and FSSC22000 certifications. Multiple manual handling steps make critical control points (CCPs) hard to sustain — audit failure means production halt or fines.
en.food_factory_deep_pain_2_desc: Food safety incidents require factories to complete batch traceability within 2 hours. Paper records or manual entry are error-prone and slow — making it impossible to quickly locate affected batches.
en.food_factory_deep_pain_3_desc: Large-scale food production typically requires 3-shift operation. Manual handling fatigue is high, night shift quality drops noticeably. Equipment failures lack early warning — a single stoppage can cost tens of thousands.
en.food_factory_deep_pain_4_desc: Energy consumption (gas, steam, electricity) accounts for a significant portion of operating costs. Many factories still use aging, inefficient heating equipment without scientific energy monitoring — resources are wasted.
en.food_factory_solution_desc: Smart food automation solutions optimized for food factory scenarios, covering the entire process from raw material prep to finished product packaging.

en.sr_pains_title: Common Pain Points for Small Restaurant Startups
en.sr_pains_subtitle: The hardest part isn't opening — it's keeping the production running smoothly, the flavor consistent, and the service fast.
en.sr_pain1_title: Chefs Are Expensive and Hard to Retain
en.sr_pain1_body: Experienced Southeast Asian chefs command high salaries — and the ones you train just leave. One sick day and the production is paralyzed. Delivery orders pile up, dine-in customers wait, bad reviews follow.
en.sr_pain2_body: A 10–15 m² production has to fit prep tables, stoves, and a packing area. Traditional gas ranges turn the whole production into an oven in summer — staff can barely stand it.
en.sr_pain3_body: Regulars come for your signature taste. Today Chef A cooks it, tomorrow Chef B — the regular takes one bite and asks "Did you change chefs?" That's how you lose customers.
en.sr_pain4_body: At 11:30, delivery and dine-in orders flood in simultaneously. Two blenders can't keep up. Customers wait 20 minutes with no food — they cancel the order, and bad reviews arrive the next day.
en.sr_pain5_title: Production Like a Furnace, Monthly Bills Shocking?
en.sr_pain5_body: Open-flame productions hit 40°C+ in summer. Staff can only endure 2 hours. Gas cylinders need replacing several times a month, electricity bills keep climbing — that's how profits get eaten.
en.sr_pain6_title: Equipment Breaks = Business Stops, No One to Fix It?
en.sr_pain6_body: At noon the stove breaks down. The next batch is prepped but can't cook. You call the supplier — they say 3–5 days. How do you serve for the next 3 days?
en.sr_scenario_1_desc: No dine-in, delivery only. The production just needs to cook fast and pack fast. One blender + one insulated server, 1–2 people is enough.

en.sr_scenario_3_desc: One production running multiple brands — every square meter must produce. Equipment must switch items fast: one machine goes from mix-fried noodles to fried rice in 5 minutes.
en.sr_scenario_4_desc: Built on 1–2 signature dishes — the key is consistency. Equipment locks in the heat and rhythm so regulars keep coming back for your flavor.

en.support_faq_kb_desc: From equipment selection to after-sales coverage — four key categories covering your top concerns.
en.support_faq_cat_1_q1: How do I choose the right health food OEM/ODM solutions?
en.support_faq_cat_1_a1: Consider these factors: 1) Production type — induction blender ranges for Chinese brewing, ovens and fryers for Western baking, food processors for fast-casual prep; 2) Daily output — estimate capacity based on daily covers; 3) Production footprint — countertop models save space, floor-standing units offer higher throughput; 4) Power supply — confirm whether your site has 220 V or 380 V. Submit your requirements via our Get a Quote page and our engineers will recommend the optimal configuration.
en.support_faq_cat_1_q2: What is the difference between 220 V and 380 V equipment? How do I choose?
en.support_faq_cat_1_a2: 220 V (single-phase) suits small restaurants, cafés, and food stalls — plugs into standard mains power with easy installation. 380 V (three-phase) is designed for large health food productions, central factorys, and brand owners where higher power, faster heating, and greater efficiency are needed; requires a certified electrician for installation. Our engineers conduct an on-site power survey before installation if you are unsure.
en.support_faq_cat_1_q3: Countertop vs. floor-standing equipment — which should I choose?
en.support_faq_cat_1_a3: Countertop units are compact and flexible, ideal for small productions with limited space; lower daily output and more budget-friendly. Floor-standing units deliver higher capacity and stability for mid-to-large health food and central factorys, typically with larger bowls and more powerful motors. Recommendation: productions under 30 m² should prioritize countertop equipment; above 30 m², choose floor-standing based on throughput needs. We provide complimentary layout planning for full-line configurations.
en.support_faq_cat_1_q4: Can equipment be customized? Do you support OEM/ODM?
en.support_faq_cat_1_a4: Yes. We offer OEM badging and ODM co-development partnerships. Customization covers exterior design, feature configuration, dimensional specifications, and control systems. Typical lead time is 30–60 working days depending on complexity. Contact our sales team via WhatsApp or email to discuss your customization requirements.
en.support_faq_cat_2_q1: What should I pay attention to when first using the equipment?
en.support_faq_cat_2_a1: Follow these steps for first use: 1) Inspect for shipping damage inside and out; 2) Verify voltage matches the nameplate before powering on; 3) Run idle for 5–10 minutes on first power-up and check for anomalies; 4) Familiarize yourself with buttons and parameter settings via the operation manual; 5) Clean the interior before putting into service. Our engineers provide on-site training during installation to ensure your staff can operate proficiently.
en.support_faq_cat_2_q2: Do smart devices support recipe import? How does it work?
en.support_faq_cat_2_a2: Yes. YuKoLi smart devices support custom recipe import via USB or Wi-Fi. Create recipes on the control panel by setting temperature, time, mixing speed and other parameters, then save as preset programs. We also provide a built-in recipe library covering Chinese brewing, Western baking, Southeast Asian productions and more. Contact technical support for the recipe management tool if you need batch import.
en.support_faq_cat_2_q3: How long can the equipment run continuously?
en.support_faq_cat_2_a3: YuKoLi health food equipment is designed for 24/7 continuous operation. We recommend a short rest and cleaning every 8–12 hours to maintain peak performance and extend service life. Built-in overheat protection automatically shuts down the unit if temperature exceeds safe limits; restart after cooling.
en.support_faq_cat_2_q4: How do I clean and maintain the equipment?
en.support_faq_cat_2_a4: Daily cleaning: Wipe surfaces with a damp cloth after each use; clean interior residue with food-grade cleaner. Daily inspection: Clear filters and drains; check blades and drive components. Weekly maintenance: Lubricate moving parts with food-grade oil; inspect power cables. Monthly deep clean: Fully disassemble and wash internal components; check consumable wear; perform function tests. Refer to the maintenance chapter of your operation manual for detailed schedules.
en.support_faq_cat_3_a1: YuKoLi provides a comprehensive warranty program: 1-year whole-unit warranty covering all non-man-made faults; 3-year warranty on core components (IGBT module, induction coil, pot body); consumables (blades, filters, seals) are excluded from warranty but available at preferential pricing. During the warranty period, YuKoLi covers all repair labor and replacement part costs arising from quality issues.
en.support_faq_cat_3_q2: How do I purchase genuine spare parts?
en.support_faq_cat_3_a2: Order through these channels: 1) Spare Parts Support page on this website; 2) WhatsApp our parts specialist; 3) Email sales.production@yukoli.com. We stock 500+ genuine spare part SKUs in our Southeast Asia regional warehouse with 48-hour dispatch for standard parts. Provide your equipment model and photos of the required part to ensure precise matching.
en.support_faq_cat_3_q3: How soon can an on-site visit be arranged after reporting a fault?
en.support_faq_cat_3_a3: Response time depends on location and issue type. Remote diagnostics: 80% of common issues are resolved instantly via WhatsApp video call. On-site service: major Southeast Asian cities within 24–48 hours; remote areas within 3–5 working days. Every ticket is tracked end-to-end — check progress at any time.
en.support_faq_cat_3_q4: What should I do if the equipment fails to start or shuts down during operation?
en.support_faq_cat_3_a4: Won't start: 1) Check power connection; 2) Verify main switch and equipment switch; 3) Check for error codes on display. Shuts down during operation: 1) Overheat protection may have triggered — wait 10 minutes to cool, then restart; 2) Check water/oil levels; 3) Inspect power cables for looseness. If the issue persists, contact after-sales via WhatsApp immediately with photos of the nameplate and error code, and we will dispatch an engineer.
en.support_faq_cat_4_q1: How soon can my order be shipped?
en.support_faq_cat_4_a1: Standard models (in stock): 3–5 working days after order confirmation and payment received. Custom equipment: 30–60 working days depending on complexity; shipped immediately upon completion. Spare parts: 48 hours for standard items. We provide real-time production and shipping updates for every order.
en.support_faq_cat_4_q2: Which countries do you export to?
en.support_faq_cat_4_a2: YuKoLi products are exported to 30+ countries and regions worldwide, with a focus on Southeast Asia including Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, the Philippines, Singapore, Myanmar, and Cambodia. We also export to the Middle East, Africa, and South America. All export equipment carries CE, ISO, ROHS and other international certifications meeting import standards worldwide. Contact our sales team to confirm specific country availability.
en.support_faq_cat_4_q3: How is shipping calculated? Does it include installation?
en.support_faq_cat_4_a3: Shipping costs are calculated per order based on equipment quantity, weight, and destination, clearly stated on the quotation with no hidden fees. Installation service: free on-site installation, commissioning, and operator training in major Southeast Asian cities (for qualifying order values). Remote areas or small-batch orders may opt for self-pickup with installation video guides and remote technical support. Confirm installation policy during the quoting stage.
en.support_faq_cat_4_q4: What payment methods do you accept?
en.support_faq_cat_4_a4: We accept multiple payment methods: Bank transfer (USD/CNY/THB and other currencies); Letter of Credit (L/C) for large orders; TT payment (typically 30% deposit, balance before shipment). Payment terms are specified in the contract. Flexible payment arrangements are available for long-term partners based on credit history.

en.support_faq_q1: How do I report equipment faults?

es.about_story_p1: Fundada en 2003 en Foshan, Guangdong — el centro de fabricación de equipos de producción de China — YuKoLi comenzó en un pequeño taller de ingeniería con un solo objetivo: transformar las produccións comerciales mediante la automatización inteligente. Tras más de 23 años de I+D continua y validación en el mercado, YuKoLi se ha convertido en un fabricante de equipos de producción inteligente totalmente integrado que abarca I+D, producción y ventas.
es.about_story_p2: Hoy, nuestros 7 modelos de equipos inteligentes atienden a clientes en 30+ países — desde cadenas de restaurantes en Bangkok hasta produccións centrales en Ciudad Ho Chi Minh, desde comedores en Kuala Lumpur hasta marcas de comida rápida en Yakarta. Ya sea que dirija un puesto de comida callejera o una cadena de mil tiendas, YuKoLi puede ayudarle a ahorrar mano de obra, estandarizar la producción y escalar de manera eficiente.

fil.about_advantage_capacity_desc: 800+ na mga smart recipe program para sa one-touch na pagluluto. Walang dependency sa kasanayan o mood ng chef — Bangkok, Jakarta, Kuala Lumpur: iisang brand, iisang lasa.
fil.about_advantage_energy_desc: Electromagnetic induction heating na may ≥90% thermal efficiency — 50–60% na mas mahusay kaysa sa tradisyonal na gas. Ang isang 15 kW unit ay nagse-save ng humigit-kumulang CNY 26,000 taun-taon.
fil.about_advantage_labor_desc: Isang operator lang ang maaaring mag-manage ng 2–5 na machine nang sabay-sabay, na may 3–6 na buwan na payback period. Hindi na kailangang mag-alala sa pag-hire o pagpapanatili ng mga chef.
fil.about_cta_desc: Makipag-partner sa YuKoLi at sumali sa 3,000+ na foodservice businesses sa buong mundo sa kanilang smart upgrade journey. Kumuha ng libreng customized proposal — ang aming mga engineer ay tutugon sa loob ng 24 na oras.
fil.about_cta_title: Handa nang i-Upgrade ang Iyong Kusina?
fil.about_hero_desc: Headquartered sa Foshan, ang health food manufacturing hub ng China, ang YuKoLi ay nakatuon ng 23 taon sa R&D at manufacturing ng health food OEM/ODM solutions. Mula sa isang Automatic Mixing Equipment hanggang sa 7 na mga smart equipment model sa lahat ng kategorya, tinutulungan namin ang mga foodservice business sa 30+ na bansa na makamit ang cost reduction, efficiency gains, at consistent output.
fil.about_meta_title: YuKoLi Health Food | About Us — Health Food Equipment Manufacturer
fil.about_mfg_adv1_desc: Ang mga CNC machining center at automated production line ay nagsisiguro ng pare-parehong precision para sa bawat component.
fil.about_mfg_adv2_desc: Multi-stage quality control — bawat unit ay dumadaan sa mahigpit na performance at safety testing bago umalis sa factory.
fil.about_mfg_adv3_desc: Strategic partnerships nang mga nangungunang global component supplier upang matiyak ang stable at maaasahang supply chain.
fil.about_mfg_adv4_desc: Mahusay na international logistics network na nagsisiguro ng ligtas na paghahatid sa 30+ na mga bansa sa buong mundo.
fil.about_mfg_desc: Ang YuKoLi's Foshan manufacturing base ay nilagyan ng advanced na CNC machining centers, automated welding systems, at full-process quality inspection lines. Bawat unit ay sumasailalim sa mahigpit na performance at safety testing bago ipadala, na nagsisiguro ng stable at maaasahang operasyon sa mga demanding na health food production environment.
fil.about_parts_dispatch_desc: Mga karaniwang wear parts (seals, bearings, thermostats, atbp.) ay ipinapadala mula sa aming Singapore warehouse sa loob ng 72 oras, idinideliver nang direkta sa iyong pintuan.
fil.about_parts_hub_desc: Isang pangunahing logistics hub para sa Southeast Asia, na sumasakop sa Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, at iba pang pangunahing merkado.
fil.about_parts_subtitle: Magastos ang equipment downtime. Sa aming parts warehouse sa Thailand, ang mga karaniwang replacement parts ay ipinapadala sa loob ng 72 oras sa anumang destinasyon sa Southeast Asia.
fil.about_parts_title: 72-Oras na Pangakong Pagpapadala ng mga Piyesa
fil.about_parts_tutorial_desc: Bawat wear part ay may kasamang step-by-step na video replacement guide — malulutas ang mga karaniwang isyu nang mag-isa sa loob lamang ng 5 minuto.
fil.about_sla_install_desc: Kasama na sa project price nang walang dagdag na bayad
fil.about_sla_recipe_desc: Lifetime free updates sa equipment recipe library — patuloy na mag-unlock ng mga bagong putahe
fil.about_sla_remote_desc: Video remote diagnostics at gabay upang mabawasan ang mga oras ng paghihintay
fil.about_sla_response_desc: Sagot sa loob ng 2 minuto sa mga oras ng negosyo
fil.about_sla_spare_parts_desc: Ang warehouse sa Thailand ay may stock ng 7 karaniwang piyesa, handa para sa agarang pagpapadala
fil.about_sla_subtitle: Ang aming after-sales service ay hindi lamang pangako — ito ay isang garantiya na nakasulat sa inyong kontrata.

fil.about_sla_training_desc: Opisyal na operator certificate na ibinibigay pagkatapos ng pagsasanay
fil.about_sla_warranty_desc: Libreng repair para sa pinsalang hindi sanhi ng tao
fil.about_story_p1: Itinatag noong 2003 sa Foshan, Guangdong — ang sentro ng paggawa ng kusinang kagamitan sa China — nagsimula ang YuKoLi sa isang maliit na engineering workshop na may iisang layunin: baguhin ang mga komersyal na kusina sa pamamagitan ng matalinong automation. Sa loob ng 23 taon ng tuloy-tuloy na R&D at pagpapatunay sa merkado, ang YuKoLi ay lumago upang maging isang ganap na integrated na tagagawa ng smart health food products na sumasaklaw sa R&D, produksyon, at pagbebenta.
fil.about_story_p2: Ngayon, ang aming 7 mga modelo ng smart equipment ay nagsisilbi sa mga customer sa 30+ mga bansa — mula sa mga chain brand sa Bangkok hanggang sa mga central factory sa Ho Chi Minh City, mula sa mga brand owner sa Kuala Lumpur hanggang sa mga fast-food brand sa Jakarta. Maging nagpapatakbo ka ng isang street food stall o isang thousand-store chain, maaaring tulungan ka ng YuKoLi na makatipid sa labor, i-standardize ang output, at mag-scale nang mahusay.

fr.about_advantage_energy_desc: Chauffage par induction électromagnétique avec un rendement thermique ≥90% — 50 à 60% plus efficace que le gaz traditionnel. Une unité de 15 kW économise environ 26 000 CNY annuellement.
fr.about_advantage_labor_desc: Un opérateur peut gérer 2 à 5 machines simultanément, avec une période de retour sur investissement de 3 à 6 mois. Finis les soucis de recrutement ou de fidélisation des chefs.
fr.about_cta_desc: Partenairez avec YuKoLi et rejoignez plus de 3 000 entreprises de restauration dans le monde dans leur transition vers l'intelligence. Obtenez une proposition personnalisée gratuite — nos ingénieurs répondront sous 24 heures.
fr.about_hero_desc: Siège social à Foshan, capitale chinoise de l'équipement de production, YuKoLi consacre 23 ans à la R&D et à la fabrication d'équipements de production commerciaux intelligents. D'une seule Machine à Blender Automatique à plus de 200 modèles d'équipements intelligents couvrant toutes les catégories, nous aidons les entreprises de restauration dans plus de 68 pays à réduire leurs coûts, gagner en efficacité et assurer une production constante.
fr.about_meta_title: Production Intelligente YuKoLi | À Propos — Fabricant d'Équipements de Production Health Foode
fr.about_mfg_adv1_desc: Les centres d'usinage CNC et les lignes de production automatisées garantissent une précision constante pour chaque composant.
fr.about_mfg_adv2_desc: Contrôle qualité multi-étapes — chaque unité passe des tests de performance et de sécurité stricts avant de quitter l'usine.
fr.about_mfg_adv3_desc: Des partenariats stratégiques avec les meilleurs fournisseurs mondiaux de composants garantissent une chaîne d'approvisionnement stable et fiable.
fr.about_mfg_adv4_desc: Réseau logistique international efficace assurant une livraison sécurisée vers 30+ pays dans le monde.
fr.about_mfg_desc: La base de fabrication YuKoLi à Foshan est équipée de centres d'usinage CNC avancés, de systèmes de soudage automatisés et de lignes d'inspection qualité en processus complet. Chaque unité subit des tests de performance et de sécurité rigoureux avant l'expédition, garantissant un fonctionnement stable et fiable dans les environnements exigeants des productions professionnelles.
fr.about_parts_dispatch_desc: Pièces d'usure courantes (joints, roulements, thermostats, etc.) expédiées depuis notre entrepôt de Singapour en 72 heures, livrées directement à votre porte.
fr.about_parts_hub_desc: Une plateforme logistique clé pour l'Asie du Sud-Est, couvrant les Philippines, l'Indonésie, la Malaisie, la Thaïlande, le Vietnam et autres marchés majeurs.
fr.about_parts_subtitle: L'immobilisation des équipements coûte cher. Avec notre entrepôt de pièces en Thaïlande, les pièces de rechange courantes sont expédiées en 72 heures vers toute destination en Asie du Sud-Est.
fr.about_parts_title: Promesse d'expédition des pièces en 72 heures
fr.about_parts_tutorial_desc: Chaque pièce d'usure est accompagnée d'un guide de remplacement vidéo étape par étape — résolvez vous-même les problèmes courants en 5 minutes.

fr.about_sla_recipe: Mises à jour de recettes gratuites
fr.about_sla_recipe_desc: Mises à jour gratuites à vie de la bibliothèque de recettes de l'équipement — débloquez continuellement de nouveaux plats
fr.about_sla_remote_desc: Diagnostics et conseils à distance par vidéo pour réduire les temps d'attente

fr.about_sla_warranty_desc: Réparation gratuite pour les dommages non causés par l'homme
fr.about_story_p1: Fondée en 2003 à Foshan, Guangdong — le centre de fabrication d'équipements de production en Chine — YuKoLi a débuté dans un petit atelier d'ingénierie avec un seul objectif : transformer les productions professionnelles grâce à l'automatisation intelligente. Après plus de 23 ans de R&D continue et de validation marché, YuKoLi est devenue un fabricant d'équipements de production intelligents entièrement intégré, couvrant la R&D, la production et les ventes.
fr.about_story_p2: Aujourd'hui, nos 7 modèles d'équipements intelligents servent des clients dans 30+ pays — des chaînes de restaurants à Bangkok aux productions centrales à Hô Chi Minh Ville, des cantines à Kuala Lumpur aux marques de restauration rapide à Jakarta. Que vous dirigiez un stand de street food ou une chaîne de mille magasins, YuKoLi peut vous aider à économiser de la main-d'œuvre, standardiser la production et passer à l'échelle efficacement.

he.search_hint: נסה לחפש לפי מספר דגם או סוג מוצר
he.about_advantage_capacity_desc: יותר מ-800 תוכניות בישול חכמות להפעלה במגע אחד. אין תלות בכישרון או במצב הרוח של השף — בנגקוק, ג'קרטה, קואלה לומפור: אותו המותג, אותו הטעם.
he.about_advantage_energy_desc: חימום בהשראה אלקטרומגנטית עם יעילות תרמית של ≥90% — יעיל ב-50–60% מגז מסורתי. יחידה של 15 kW חוסכת כ-26,000 CNY בשנה.
he.about_advantage_labor_desc: מפעיל אחד יכול לנהל 2–5 מכונות בו-זמנית, עם תקופת החזר השקעה של 3–6 חודשים. אין יותר דאגה לגיוס או שימור שפים.
he.about_cta_desc: שתפו פעולה עם YuKoLi והצטרפו ליותר מ-3,000 עסקי קייטרינג ברחבי העולם במסע השדרוג החכם שלהם. קבלו הצעה מותאמת אישית ללא תשלום — המהנדסים שלנו ישיבו בתוך 24 שעות.
he.about_hero_desc: YuKoLi, שמרכזה בפושאן, בירת ציוד הייצור של סין, הקדישה 23 שנים למחקר, פיתוח וייצור של ציוד ייצור מסחרי חכם. ממכינת ווק אוטומטית אחת ליותר מ-200 דגמים של ציוד חכם בכל הקטגוריות, אנו מסייעים לעסקי קייטרינג ביותר מ-68 מדינות להשיג הפחתת עלויות, שיפור יעילות ותפוקה עקבית.
he.about_meta_title: YuKoLi ייצור חכם | אודותינו — יצרן ציוד ייצור מסחרי
he.about_mfg_adv1_desc: מכונות עיבוד שבבי CNC וקווי ייצור אוטומטיים מבטיחים דיוק עקבי לכל רכיב.
he.about_mfg_adv2_desc: בקרת איכות רב-שלבית — כל יחידה עוברת בדיקות ביצועים ובטיחות קפדניות לפני יציאה מהמפעל.
he.about_mfg_adv3_desc: שותפויות אסטרטגיות עם ספקי רכיבים גלובליים מובילים מבטיחות שרשרת אספקה יציבה ואמינה.
he.about_mfg_adv4_desc: רשת לוגיסטית בינלאומית יעילה המבטיחה משלוח בטוח ל-30+ מדינות ברחבי העולם.
he.about_mfg_desc: בסיס הייצור של YuKoLi בפושאן מצויד במכונות CNC מתקדמות, מערכות ריתוך אוטומטיות וקווי בדיקת איכות לכל אורך התהליך. כל יחידה עוברת בדיקות ביצועים ובטיחות קפדניות לפני המשלוח, ומבטיחה פעולה יציבה ואמינה בסביבות ייצור מסחרי תובעניות.
he.about_parts_dispatch_desc: חלקי בלאי נפוצים (אטמים, מסבים, תרמוסטטים וכו') נשלחים ממחסן סינגפור שלנו תוך 72 שעות, ומסופקים ישירות לדלתך.
he.about_parts_hub_desc: מרכז לוגיסטי מרכזי לדרום-מזרח אסיה, המכסה את הפיליפינים, אינדונזיה, מלזיה, תאילנד, וייטנאם ושווקים מרכזיים נוספים.
he.about_parts_subtitle: זמן השבתה של ציוד יקר. עם מחסן החלקים שלנו בתאילנד, חלקי חילוף נפוצים נשלחים תוך 72 שעות לכל יעד בדרום-מזרח אסיה.
he.about_parts_tutorial_desc: כל חלק בלאי מגיע עם מדריך החלפה מצולם שלב-אחר-שלב — פתור תקלות נפוצות בעצמך בתוך 5 דקות בלבד.
he.about_sla_install_desc: כלולים במחיר הפרויקט ללא תוספת תשלום
he.about_sla_recipe_desc: עדכונים חינם לכל החיים לספריית המתכונים של הציוד — שחרר מנות חדשות ברציפות
he.about_sla_remote_desc: אבחון והדרכה מרחוק באמצעות וידאו להקטנת זמני ההמתנה
he.about_sla_spare_parts_desc: מחסן בתאילנד מאחסן 7 חלקי חילוף נפוצים, מוכנים למשלוח מיידי
he.about_sla_subtitle: שירות הלקוחות שלנו אינו רק הבטחה — זו אחריות הכתובה בחוזה שלכם.
he.about_sla_title: SLA לאחר מכירה — כתוב בחוזה שלכם
he.about_sla_training_desc: תעודת מפעיל רשמית הניתנת עם סיום ההדרכה
he.about_sla_warranty_desc: תיקון חינם לנזק שאינו נגרם על ידי אדם
he.about_story_p1: נוסדה ב-2003 בפושאן, גואנגדונג — מרכז ייצור ציוד הייצור של סין — YuKoLi החלה בסדנה הנדסית קטנה עם מטרה אחת: לשנות את פני הייצורים המסחריים באמצעות אוטומציה חכמה. לאחר יותר מ-23 שנים של מחקר ופיתוח מתמשך ואימות שוק, YuKoLi צמחה ליצרנית ציוד ייצור חכם משולבת המלאה הכוללת מחקר ופיתוח, ייצור ומכירות.
he.about_story_p2: היום, 7 דגמי הציוד החכם שלנו משרתים לקוחות ב-30+ מדינות — ממסעדות רשת בבנגקוק לייצורים מרכזיים בהו צ'י מין סיטי, מחדרי אוכל בקואלה לומפור למותגי מזון מהיר בג'קרטה. בין אם אתם מפעילים דוכן מזון רחוב או רשת של אלף סניפים, YuKoLi יכולה לעזור לכם לחסוך בכוח אדם, לתקנן את התפוקה ולצמוח ביעילות.
he.about_wa_cta_desc: מענה תוך 2 דק' · אבחון וידאו מרחוק · תמיכה טכנית במקום
he.case_card4_desc: מערכת אקולוגית ניידת מאוחדת לניהול הון וביטוח אישי.
he.case_cta_desc: בואו נדון כיצד YuKoLi יכולה לשנות את תהליכי העסק שלכם ולמקסם את ההשקעה הדיגיטלית שלכם.
he.contact_hero_desc: בין אם אתם זקוקים להצעת מחיר, תמיכה טכנית או הזדמנויות לשותפות, הצוות הגלובלי שלנו מוכן לשרת אתכם.
he.contact_partner_desc: הצטרפו לרשת הסוחרים והמשווקים הגלובלית שלנו. אנו מציעים שולי רוח תחרותיים, הכשרה מקיפה ותמיכה ייעודית.
he.home_mobile_cta_desc: מוכנים לשנות את העסק שלכם? צרו איתנו קשר היום.
he.home_mobile_feature1_desc: קבלו החלטות מבוססות נתונים בזמן אמת
he.home_mobile_hero_desc: שנה את העסק שלך עם פתרונות מבוססי בינה מלאכותית
he.profit_calc_hero_subtitle: הזן את נתוני התפעול שלך וקבל הערכת ROI תוך 45 שניות
he.profit_calc_placeholder_desc: מלא את הטופס ולחץ על חשב כדי לראות את התוצאות
he.profit_calc_placeholder_title: הזן את הנתונים שלך כדי לראות את הערכת ה-ROI
he.quote_114_products_desc: מכסה ווק, אידוי, מרק, בישול אורז וכל תרחישי הייצור המסחרי.
he.quote_50_countries_desc: שורשים עמוקים בדרום-מזרח אסיה, מוצרים נמכרים ל-30+ מדינות ברחבי העולם.
he.quote_after_sales_desc: הדרכת התקנה, הכשרת מפעילים ותמיכה טכנית מתמשכת.
he.quote_certified_desc: בעלי אישורי CE, UL, ISO 9001 להבטחת איכות.
he.quote_consent_text: אני מסכים/ה למדיניות הפרטיות ולתנאי השירות.
he.quote_error_consent: אנא אשר/י את מדיניות הפרטיות תחילה
he.quote_error_required_fields: אנא מלא/י את כל השדות הנדרשים (מסומנים במסגרת אדומה)
he.quote_error_submit: השליחה נכשלה. אנא נסה/נסי שוב מאוחר יותר.
he.quote_hero_desc: ספר לנו על צורכי הייצור המסחרי שלך. נספק פתרון מותאם אישית לציוד חכם והצעת מחיר בתוך 24 שעות.
he.quote_hero_desc_532: קבל הצעת מחיר מותאמת אישית לצרכי העסק שלך
he.quote_placeholder_requirements: תאר את הדרישות שלך, כגון סוג הייצור, תפוקה יומית, צרכים מיוחדים וכו'
he.quote_prefer_chat_desc: פנה אלינו ישירות בוואטסאפ לתמיכה מיידית
he.quote_strategy_3_desc: ייעל פעולות והפחת עלויות עם אוטומציה
he.quote_strategy_5_desc: פתרונות מותאמים אישית לצרכים הספציפיים שלך
he.quote_success: נשלח בהצלחה! ניצור איתך קשר בקרוב.
he.quote_trust_experts_desc: מומחים ותיקים עם שנים של ניסיון
he.quote_trust_speed_desc: משלוח מהיר ללא פשרות על האיכות
he.thank_you_desc: הצוות שלנו ייצור איתך קשר בקרוב עם הפתרון הטוב ביותר לאוטומציה של ייצור מסחרי.

hi.case_hero_desc: See how leading food service companies are transforming their production with Yukoli.
hi.footer_copyright: © 2026 Yukoli Technology Co., Ltd. All Rights Reserved.
hi.footer_tagline: Setting the standard for the next generation of industrial culinary excellence. Made for chefs, powered by engineers.
hi.home_hero_desc: Revolutionize your culinary operations with AI-driven robotics and the Yukoli IoT Backbone. Achieve 3x ROI in the first year with our hardware-first ecosystem.
hi.home_int_cloud_desc: Optimize turnaround times with hyper-efficient robotic prep stations.
hi.home_int_enterprise_desc: Sync 500+ locations with real-time recipe deployment and inventory tracking.
hi.home_int_health_desc: Ensure 100% compliance with nutrient-locked precision production.
hi.iot_section_desc: Yukoli OS is the nervous system of the modern production. Our proprietary IoT backbone predicts hardware failures before they occur, reducing downtime by 94%.
hi.pdp_cloud_vault_desc: End-to-end encrypted storage for your proprietary IP.
hi.pdp_enterprise_sec_desc: Secure tunneling for remote diagnostics and updates.
hi.pdp_hero_desc: The intersection of aerospace engineering and culinary mastery. Automated precision designed for the world's most demanding food brands.
hi.pdp_high_consistency_desc: Proprietary Yukoli sensors ensure identical flavor profiles across 10,000+ iterations with zero variance.
hi.pdp_high_efficiency_desc: Parallel processing architecture allows for simultaneous seasoning and heat control, maximizing output per square meter.
hi.pdp_high_speed_desc: Industry-leading throughput of 430+ complex dishes daily, outperforming human lines by 3.5x.
hi.pdp_iot_sync_desc: Sync recipes across global locations in real-time.
hi.pdp_low_waste_desc: Precision ingredient dispensing systems reduce raw material loss by 18% compared to manual preparation.
hi.pdp_os_desc: A purpose-built operating system for the modern culinary enterprise. Manage global fleets, update secret recipes, and monitor equipment health from any device.
hi.pdp_predictive_maint_desc: AI-driven diagnostics predict component wear before failure.
hi.pdp_spec_subtitle: Deep dive into the Pro's engineering capabilities.
hi.pdp_three_highs_subtitle: Engineered for maximum ROI in high-volume hospitality environments.
hi.popup_tell_us: Tell us about your project needs — our team will respond within 24 hours.
hi.product_hydro_wash_pro_desc: Zero-waste water filtration with automated sanitization logic.
hi.product_omni_oven_x1_desc: Multi-zone intelligent convection with 0.1°C precision controls.
hi.product_robo_chef_s2_desc: High-precision automated production with haptic feedback sensors.
hi.product_sous_chef_lite_desc: Automated prep and ingredient sorting for high-volume units.
hi.search_hint: मॉडल नंबर या उत्पाद प्रकार से खोजने का प्रयास करें
hi.about_advantage_capacity_desc: 800+ स्मार्ट रेसिपी प्रोग्राम, वन-टच कुकिंग। शेफ के कौशल या मूड पर निर्भर नहीं — बैंकॉक, जकार्ता, क्वालालम्पुर: एक ही ब्रांड, एक ही स्वाद।
hi.about_advantage_energy_desc: इलेक्ट्रोमैग्नेटिक इंडक्शन हीटिंग से ≥90% थर्मल एफिशिएंसी — पारंपरिक गैस से 50–60% अधिक कुशल। 15 kW यूनिट से वार्षिक लगभग ¥26,000 की बचत।
hi.about_advantage_labor_desc: एक ऑपरेटर 2–5 मशीनों को एक साथ चला सकता है, 3–6 महीने में निवेश वापसी। शेफ की भर्ती या बनाए रखने की चिंता से मुक्ति।
hi.about_cta_desc: YuKoLi के साथ साझेदारी करें और दुनिया भर के 3,000+ खाद्य सेवा व्यवसायों के साथ स्मार्ट अपग्रेड की यात्रा में शामिल हों। निःशुल्क कस्टम प्रस्ताव प्राप्त करें — हमारे इंजीनियर 24 घंटे के भीतर जवाब देंगे।
hi.about_cta_title: अपनी किचन अपग्रेड करने के लिए तैयार हैं?
hi.about_hero_desc: चीन की किचन उपकरण राजधानी फोशन में मुख्यालय, YuKoLi ने 23 वर्षों तक स्मार्ट वाणिज्यिक किचन उपकरणों के R&D और निर्माण में समर्पित किया है। एक ऑटोमैटिक वोक मशीन से 7 स्मार्ट उपकरण मॉडल तक, हम 30+ देशों में खाद्य सेवा व्यवसायों की लागत कम करने, दक्षता बढ़ाने और एक समान उत्पादन में मदद करते हैं।
hi.about_meta_title: YuKoLi स्मार्ट किचन | हमारे बारे में — वाणिज्यिक किचन उपकरण निर्माता
hi.about_mfg_adv1_desc: CNC मशीनिंग सेंटर और स्वचालित उत्पादन लाइनें हर घटक के लिए सुसंगत सटीकता सुनिश्चित करती हैं।
hi.about_mfg_adv2_desc: बहु-चरण गुणवत्ता नियंत्रण — हर यूनिट फैक्ट्री से निकलने से पहले सख्त प्रदर्शन और सुरक्षा परीक्षण से गुजरती है।
hi.about_mfg_adv3_desc: शीर्ष वैश्विक घटक आपूर्तिकर्ताओं के साथ रणनीतिक साझेदारी स्थिर और विश्वसनीय आपूर्ति श्रृंखला सुनिश्चित करती है।
hi.about_mfg_adv4_desc: कुशल अंतर्राष्ट्रीय लॉजिस्टिक नेटवर्क दुनिया भर के 30+ देशों में सुरक्षित डिलीवरी सुनिश्चित करता है।
hi.about_mfg_desc: YuKoLi का फोशन निर्माण आधार उन्नत CNC मशीनिंग सेंटर, स्वचालित वेल्डिंग सिस्टम और पूर्ण-प्रक्रिया गुणवत्ता निरीक्षण लाइनों से सुसज्जित है।
hi.about_parts_dispatch_desc: सामान्य पहन-भाग (सील, बेयरिंग, थर्मोस्टैट आदि) हमारे सिंगापुर गोदाम से 72 घंटे के भीतर डिस्पैच।
hi.about_parts_hub_desc: दक्षिण पूर्व एशिया के लिए प्रमुख लॉजिस्टिक हब। फिलीपींस, इंडोनेशिया, मलेशिया, थाईलैंड, वियतनाम आदि।
hi.about_parts_subtitle: उपकरण डाउनटाइम महंगा है। हमारे थाईलैंड पार्ट्स गोदाम से दक्षिण पूर्व एशिया में कहीं भी 72 घंटे में पार्ट्स डिस्पैच।
hi.about_parts_tutorial_desc: हर पहन-भाग के साथ चरणबद्ध वीडियो रिप्लेसमेंट गाइड — 5 मिनट में सामान्य समस्याएं स्वयं हल करें।
hi.about_sla_install_desc: प्रोजेक्ट मूल्य में शामिल, कोई अतिरिक्त लागत नहीं
hi.about_sla_recipe_desc: उपकरण रेसिपी लाइब्रेरी का आजीवन मुफ्त अपडेट — नए व्यंजन लगातार जोड़ें
hi.about_sla_response_desc: कार्य घंटों में 2 मिनट के भीतर प्रतिक्रिया
hi.about_sla_spare_parts_desc: थाईलैंड गोदाम में 7 सामान्य स्पेयर पार्ट्स, तत्काल डिस्पैच तैयार
hi.about_sla_subtitle: हमारी बिक्री के बाद सेवा केवल एक वादा नहीं — यह आपके अनुबंध में लिखी गारंटी है।
hi.about_sla_title: बिक्री के बाद SLA — आपके अनुबंध में लिखी

hi.about_sla_warranty_desc: मानवीय कारणों से हुए नुकसान की मुफ्त मरम्मत
hi.about_story_p1: 2003 में फोशन, गुआंगडोंग — चीन के किचन उपकरण निर्माण हब में स्थापित। YuKoLi ने एक छोटे इंजीनियरिंग वर्कशॉप से शुरुआत की, एक लक्ष्य के साथ: बुद्धिमान स्वचालन से वाणिज्यिक किचन को बदलना। 23 वर्षों के निरंतर R&D और बाजार सत्यापन के बाद, YuKoLi R&D, उत्पादन और बिक्री को कवर करने वाले पूर्ण रूप से एकीकृत स्मार्ट किचन उपकरण निर्माता के रूप में विकसित हुआ।
hi.about_story_p2: आज, हमारे 7 स्मार्ट उपकरण मॉडल 30+ देशों में ग्राहकों की सेवा करते हैं — बैंकॉक की चेन रेस्तरां से हो ची मिन्ह सिटी की सेंट्रल किचन तक, क्वालालम्पुर की कैंटीन से जकार्ता के फास्ट फूड ब्रांड तक।

id.about_advantage_capacity_desc: 800+ program resep pintar untuk memasak satu sentuh. Tidak bergantung pada keahlian atau mood juru masak — Bangkok, Jakarta, Kuala Lumpur: merek sama, rasa sama.
id.about_advantage_energy_desc: Pemanasan induksi elektromagnetik dengan efisiensi termal ≥90% — 50–60% lebih hemat dibanding gas konvensional. Unit 15 kW menghemat sekitar CNY 26.000 per tahun.
id.about_advantage_labor_desc: Satu operator dapat mengelola 2–5 mesin sekaligus, masa pengembalian modal 3–6 bulan. Tidak perlu lagi khawatir merekrut atau mempertahankan juru masak.
id.about_cta_desc: Bermitra dengan YuKoLi dan bergabung dengan 3.000+ bisnis F&B di seluruh dunia dalam perjalanan peningkatan produksi pintar. Dapatkan proposal kustom gratis — insinyur kami akan merespons dalam 24 jam.
id.about_hero_desc: Berkantor pusat di Foshan, ibu kota peralatan produksi Tiongkok, YuKoLi telah mendedikasikan 23 tahun untuk R&D dan manufaktur peralatan produksi komersial pintar. Dari satu Mesin Wajan Otomatis menjadi 7 model peralatan pintar di semua kategori, kami membantu bisnis F&B di 30+ negara mengurangi biaya, meningkatkan efisiensi, dan menjaga konsistensi hasil.
id.about_hero_title_2: Setiap Menu, Tanpa Perlu Juru Masak
id.about_meta_title: YuKoLi Health Food | Tentang Kami — Produsen Peralatan Dapur Komersial
id.about_mfg_adv1_desc: Pusat pemesinan CNC dan lini produksi otomatis memastikan presisi konsisten untuk setiap komponen.
id.about_mfg_adv2_desc: Kontrol kualitas multi-tahap — setiap unit melewati pengujian kinerja dan keselamatan ketat sebelum dikirim.
id.about_mfg_adv3_desc: Kemitraan strategis dengan pemasok komponen global terkemuka memastikan rantai pasokan yang stabil.
id.about_mfg_adv4_desc: Jaringan logistik internasional yang efisien memastikan pengiriman aman ke 30+ negara.
id.about_mfg_desc: Basis manufaktur YuKoLi di Foshan dilengkapi dengan pusat pemesinan CNC canggih, sistem pengelasan otomatis, dan lini inspeksi kualitas menyeluruh. Setiap unit menjalani pengujian kinerja dan keselamatan ketat sebelum pengiriman.
id.about_parts_dispatch_desc: Suku cadang aus umum (seal, bearing, termostat, dll.) dikirim dari gudang Singapura dalam 72 jam, langsung ke lokasi Anda.
id.about_parts_hub_desc: Hub logistik utama Asia Tenggara, mencakup Filipina, Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, dan pasar utama lainnya.
id.about_parts_subtitle: Downtime peralatan sangat merugikan. Dengan gudang suku cadang di Thailand, suku cadang pengganti umum dikirim dalam 72 jam ke tujuan mana pun di Asia Tenggara.
id.about_parts_tutorial_desc: Setiap suku cadang aus dilengkapi video panduan penggantian langkah demi langkah — selesaikan masalah umum sendiri hanya dalam 5 menit.

id.about_story_p1: Didirikan pada 2003 di Foshan, Guangdong — hub manufaktur peralatan produksi Tiongkok — YuKoLi bermula dari bengkel teknik kecil dengan satu tujuan: mengubah produksi komersial melalui otomasi pintar. Selama 23 tahun R&D berkelanjutan, YuKoLi telah berkembang menjadi produsen peralatan produksi pintar terintegrasi.
id.about_story_p2: Hari ini, 7 model peralatan pintar kami melayani pelanggan di 30+ negara — dari restoran waralaba di Bangkok hingga produksi sentral di Ho Chi Minh City, dari kantin di Kuala Lumpur hingga merek makanan cepat saji di Jakarta. Baik Anda mengelola gerai pinggir jalan atau waralaba ribuan cabang, YuKoLi dapat membantu Anda menghemat tenaga kerja, menstandardisasi hasil, dan berkembang secara efisien.

id.news_1_title: Robot Memasak Cerdas YuKoLi Debut di Asia Food Expo 2026
id.news_1_summary: YuKoLi meluncurkan robot memasak cerdas generasi ke-5 dengan konsistensi masakan 99.5% dan penghematan biaya tenaga kerja 70%, menarik minat 7 brand F&B di Asia Tenggara.

id.news_2_summary: Brand tersebut memasang lini memasak YuKoLi di 86 gerai, mencapai produksi terstandar dari produksi pusat dan meningkatkan output harian 3 kali lipat per gerai.

id.news_3_summary: Setelah audit ketat, seluruh lini produk YuKoLi lulus sertifikasi manajemen mutu internasional dan kepatuhan keselamatan EU, memberikan jaminan lebih andal bagi pelanggan global.

id.landing_case_study_badge: Studi Kasus: Peningkatan Otomasi Kantin Rantai
id.landing_sp_title: Dipercaya oleh Bisnis F&B di Seluruh Asia Tenggara
id.landing_sp_desc: Umpan balik nyata dari pelanggan di Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, dan Indonesia
id.landing_sp_c1_text: "Sejak memperkenalkan oven kombi pintar YuKoLi, waktu persiapan makanan rata-rata di 12 lokasi kami turun 35%. Yang paling mengesankan adalah standarisasi rasa — baik di Bangkok atau Chiang Mai, setiap hidangan terasa sama persis."
id.landing_sp_c2_text: "Dapur pusat kami memproses 8,000+ hidangan setiap hari. Sistem kontrol suhu pintar YuKoLi mengurangi konsumsi energi 22%, dan respons layanan purna jual sangat cepat — dengan tim teknis lokal di Vietnam."
id.landing_sp_c3_text: "Sebagai grup hotel bintang lima, kami menuntut standar peralatan tertinggi. YuKoLi tidak hanya memenuhi setiap persyaratan sertifikasi keamanan pangan, tetapi juga membantu kami mengurangi staf buffet sarapan 40%."
id.landing_challenge_title: 3 Masalah Utama dalam Ekspansi Rantai Restoran
id.landing_challenge_desc: Saat lokasi rantai berkembang, biaya tenaga kerja, energi, dan sewa terus meningkat sementara margin keuntungan menyusut. Peralatan produksi pintar YuKoLi mengatasi hambatan ini dari sumbernya.
id.landing_rising_wages_and_employee_turnov: Merekrut juru masak sulit dan turnover tinggi. Mesin masak pintar dan peralatan persiapan otomatis memungkinkan satu juru masak mengelola tiga unit secara bersamaan, mengurangi ketergantungan pada tenaga kerja terampil secara drastis.
